response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Highly compatible. The song lyrics from the reference JSON perfectly match the vocal audio in the latter portion of the video (from 04:46.400). 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for transcribing the vocal section. The instrumental/promotional slides from 00:00 to 04:46 were left unsubtitled as they contained no vocals and the on-screen text consists of hundreds of tiny, scrolling fan letters. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully around the vocals to ensure precise alignment, with seamless transitions between rapid phrases to avoid any cascading delay.
